comparison_method: intersect Paper 3 holdout IDs with Paper 2 per-id refusal judgments

training_mix.rebalance_method: down-sample help-side (overref) to match refuse-side (core_s2 + xl) at SEED-keyed RNG

notes: Toxicity recovered 7.5 pp from rebalance (-11.3 -> -3.8), still 3.8 pp below base.
Jailbreak collapsed: lost 4 base-refusals (4/20 = 20pp) and gained 0 new refusals over base. The rebalance robbed jailbreak refusal of training signal.
Cross-lingual barely moved (+1.2 pp); inside Wilson noise band on n=86.
Over-refusal moved up 5pp on the rejected direction (more refusal on benign prompts), opposite of intent.

Net interpretation: the data-mix lever moves things but does not fix the recipe. The 88 refuse-side pairs are not enough to lift cross-lingual; the 88 help-side pairs are not the only thing causing toxicity regression.
